commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the provider routing change has a concrete security-sensitive defect before merge.; Needs attention: The provider routing diff has a concrete credential-boundary concern because a raw URL substring can select Vertex ADC auth for a non-Vertex origin.; Review finding: [P1] Match Vertex hosts by parsed hostname — extensions/google/provider-reg... commands.review_summary:
The PR updates model-ref normalization in runtime/plugin fallback paths, changes Google Vertex stream transport selection and base URL normalization, and allows `ensureAbsoluteDirectory` to accept symlinked directories with regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked bugs are source-reproducible on current main: model refs can double-prefix, Google Vertex routing is bypassed by the Generative AI branch, and `ensureAbsoluteDirectory` rejects symlinked directories via `lstat`.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the provider routing change has a concrete security-sensitive defect before merge.
